scripts.dev: docker compose --env-file packages/db/.env up -d && corepack pnpm run dev:apps
scripts.dev:apps: corepack pnpm --filter @decentdebates/db run build && corepack pnpm --recursive --parallel --filter @decentdebates/db --filter api --filter client run dev
scripts.db:reset: docker compose --env-file packages/db/.env down -v && docker compose --env-file packages/db/.env up -d
